query: SELECT nickname, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM players GROUP BY nickname HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute SELECT nickname, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM players GROUP BY nickname HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 20;
